nasb.text: But Joab and Abishai pursued Abner, and when the sun was going down, they came to the hill of Ammah, which is in front of Giah by the way of the wilderness of Gibeon.

esv.text: But Joab and Abishai pursued Abner. And as the sun was going down they came to the hill of Ammah, which lies before Giah on the way to the wilderness of Gibeon.

cnv.text: 約押和亞比篩卻繼續追趕押尼珥。日落的時候，他們來到亞瑪山，就在通往基遍曠野的路旁，基亞的對面。

ccb.text: 但约押和亚比筛却继续追赶押尼珥。太阳落山时，他们追到了基亚附近的亚玛山，通往基遍旷野的路旁。
